title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Someone to Learn From

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I didn't even come close! How is she so much
better than me?!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan has won the spring shield! What an
incredible display of might from the Mejiro
family!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Way to go, Ryan! I bet the whole Mejiro family is
just beaming with pride right now!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... She's practically shaking with joy! I wonder
what she's going to say...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the only runner in the Mejiro
family! And at the Takarazuka Kinen, I, Mejiro
Ryan, will show you once again that I'm not to be
ignored!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll all keep cheering for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(If I was standing there victorious right now, I'd
probably just scream with joy.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But not Ryan... She prioritized thanking her fans
over celebrating her own victory.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Now that's someone who's lived shouldering
expectations. That's what separates me and her...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind! At the Takarazuka Kinen,
that's gonna be me!
